Human Resources

Wulftec is a dynamic and innovative company that celebrated 30 years of success in 2020.  The 320 specialized employees design, build and sell wrapping equipment worldwide.

Recruitment Brochure

Our values are: Innovation, Respect, Integrity and Autonomy.

At Wulftec, we pride ourselves in the excellent quality of our products and our renowned personalized customer service.

In order to attain this level of quality and service, we strive to hire qualified people in each sector of activity, helping them to achieve their full potential through peer coaching and development.
